summary: Reduce token waste across harness workflow through session-scoped state, lean agent dispatch, token-budgeted learnings, session summaries, and learnings-driven feedback loop to roadmap

decisions.why: Parallel Claude Code windows must not conflict

decisions.what: Agents load their own context via gather_context()
decisions.why: Eliminates duplicated learnings/failures text embedded in agent prompts
Turns maintenance into a process improvement feedback loop that feeds the roadmap
Measure impact of these changes first before structural changes
